title: antirrhinum orontium var. calycinum
intro: Antirrhinum orontium var. calycinum, also known as the beauty of the missouri, is a flowering plant species in the snapdragon family that is native to the Midwestern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Herbal preparations of Antirrhinum orontium var. calycinum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
